name: RC One-Way Slab — Flexural Design Steel Area, Depth Check & One-Way Shear Verification
subtitle: Concrete Construction | Structural Engineering — ACI 318-19 §7, §9, §22.5, EN 1992-1-1:2004 §6.2, §9.3

inScope: RC One-Way Slab — Flexural Design Steel Area, Depth Check & One-Way Shear Verification
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Factored Bending Moment per Metre Width (M_u / M_Ed)
Factored Shear Force per Metre Width (V_u / V_Ed)

standards.name: RC One-Way Slab — Flexural Design Steel Area, Depth Check & One-Way Shear Verification
standards.description: RC One-Way Slab — Flexural Design Steel Area, Depth Check & One-Way Shear Verification — Concrete Construction, Structural Engineering

formulas.expression: d_mm = slab_thickness_mm - cover_mm - bar_diameter_mm / 2; Rn_mpa = Mu_knm_m * 1e6 / (0.9 * 1000 * Math.pow(d_mm, 2))
formulas.reference: d = h − c_c − d_b/2; R_n = M_u/(φ·b·d²); φ=0.9 tension-controlled — ACI 318-19 §21.2.2

formulas.expression: rho_req = (0.85 * fc_prime_mpa / fy_mpa) * (1 - Math.sqrt(1 - 2 * Rn_mpa / (0.85 * fc_prime_mpa))); rho_min = Math.max(0.25 * Math.sqrt(fc_prime_mpa) / fy_mpa, 1.4 / fy_mpa); rho_max = 0.75 * 0.85 * 0.85 * fc_prime_mpa / fy_mpa * (600 / (600 + fy_mpa)); rho_design = Math.max(rho_req, rho_min)
As_req_mm2_m = rho_design * 1000 * d_mm; bar_area_mm2 = Math.PI / 4 * Math.pow(bar_diameter_mm, 2); spacing_mm = Math.floor(bar_area_mm2 / As_req_mm2_m * 1000)
formulas.reference: A_s = ρ·b·d; spacing s = a_bar/A_s × 1000 — ACI §25.2.1: max spacing ≤ min(3h, 450 mm)

formulas.expression: s_max_mm = Math.min(3 * slab_thickness_mm, 450); s_ok = spacing_mm <= s_max_mm
formulas.reference: ACI 318-19 §7.7.2.3 — maximum flexural bar spacing: min(3h, 450 mm)
ACI 318-19 §22.5.5.1 — φV_c = 0.75×0.17λ√f'c×b_w×d; slabs without stirrups; SI units

formulas.expression: shear_DCR = Vu_kn_m / phi_Vc_kn_m; L_d_ratio = span_m * 1000 / d_mm; L_d_limit = (fy_mpa === 420) ? 20 : 18
formulas.reference: Shear DCR ≤ 1.0 (no stirrups required); L/d deflection control per ACI §24.2 (approximate method)

validation.message: Required steel ratio exceeds 75% of balanced — slab is over-stressed; increase slab thickness by 20–30 mm or increase f'c; compression-controlled failure mode unacceptable
One-way shear demand exceeds concrete capacity: stirrups required in slab (unusual) — verify load/span; more practical to increase slab thickness until V_u < φV_c
Effective depth < 70% of total thickness: very large cover or bar size — verify cover is correct; large bars in thin slabs reduce d significantly

warnings.message: Span-to-depth ratio exceeds ACI §24.2 deflection limit — computed deflections must be checked; long-term creep deflection (×2.0 for 5+ years) may damage partitions or finishes
Bar spacing < 75 mm: congestion risk — concrete aggregate cannot flow between bars; ACI §25.2.1 requires clear spacing ≥ bar diameter, 25 mm, or 4/3 × aggregate size
Bar spacing exceeds ACI maximum: cracks will be wide — use smaller diameter bars at closer spacing or redesign to meet s ≤ min(3h, 450 mm)
Minimum steel governs: slab is lightly loaded for its depth — consider reducing slab thickness to L/20 minimum per ACI Table 9.3.1.1 for efficiency
High moment coefficient (R_n > 30% of 0.85f'c): approaching over-reinforced zone — verify d is adequate; increase thickness before adding reinforcement

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
